text: concept.AccountData base_entity_concept AccountData Base concept for account-like records with common identifiers and status fields. Base concept for account-like records with common identifiers and status fields.
value.AccountData.account_id value_type_property account_id {AccountData} has account identifier {AccountIdentifier} {AccountData} has account identifier {AccountIdentifier}
value.AccountData.account_status value_type_property account_status {AccountData} has account status {StatusCode} {AccountData} has account status {StatusCode}

concept.MarginAccount entity_type_concept MarginAccount Account used to hold margin obligations and pledged collateral. Account used to hold margin obligations and pledged collateral. margin_accounts margin_accounts.account_id margin_accounts.account_status margin_accounts.base_currency margin_accounts.counterparty_id

concept.Counterparty entity_type_concept Counterparty Legal entity that owns margin accounts and posts collateral. Legal entity that owns margin accounts and posts collateral. counterparties counterparties.counterparty_id counterparties.domicile_country counterparties.legal_name counterparties.regulatory_segment

concept.CollateralAsset entity_type_concept CollateralAsset Asset pledged as collateral for margin obligations. Asset pledged as collateral for margin obligations. collateral_positions collateral_positions.asset_type collateral_positions.collateral_id collateral_positions.currency collateral_positions.issuer_country
value.MarginAccount.base_currency value_type_property base_currency {MarginAccount} has base currency {CurrencyCode} {MarginAccount} has base currency {CurrencyCode}
value.Counterparty.counterparty_id value_type_property counterparty_id Counterparty.counterparty_id uses CounterpartyIdentifier. Counterparty.counterparty_id uses CounterpartyIdentifier.
value.Counterparty.legal_name value_type_property legal_name Counterparty.legal_name uses LegalName. Counterparty.legal_name uses LegalName.
value.Counterparty.domicile_country value_type_property domicile_country Counterparty.domicile_country uses CountryCode. Counterparty.domicile_country uses CountryCode.
value.Counterparty.regulatory_segment value_type_property regulatory_segment Counterparty.regulatory_segment uses RegulatorySegment. Counterparty.regulatory_segment uses RegulatorySegment.
value.CollateralAsset.collateral_id value_type_property collateral_id CollateralAsset.collateral_id uses CollateralIdentifier. CollateralAsset.collateral_id uses CollateralIdentifier.
value.CollateralAsset.asset_type value_type_property asset_type CollateralAsset.asset_type uses AssetType. CollateralAsset.asset_type uses AssetType.
value.CollateralAsset.currency value_type_property currency CollateralAsset.currency uses CurrencyCode. CollateralAsset.currency uses CurrencyCode.
value.CollateralAsset.issuer_country value_type_property issuer_country CollateralAsset.issuer_country uses CountryCode. CollateralAsset.issuer_country uses CountryCode.
value.CollateralAsset.market_value_amount value_type_property market_value_amount CollateralAsset.market_value_amount uses MonetaryAmount. CollateralAsset.market_value_amount uses MonetaryAmount.

concept.CollateralValuation entity_type_concept CollateralValuation Daily valuation record for collateral after market close. Daily valuation record for collateral after market close. collateral_valuations collateral_valuations.collateral_id collateral_valuations.haircut_rate collateral_valuations.market_value_amount collateral_valuations.valuation_date collateral_valuations.valuation_id
value.CollateralValuation.valuation_id value_type_property valuation_id CollateralValuation.valuation_id uses ValuationIdentifier. CollateralValuation.valuation_id uses ValuationIdentifier.
value.CollateralValuation.valuation_date value_type_property valuation_date CollateralValuation.valuation_date uses Date. CollateralValuation.valuation_date uses Date.

value.CollateralValuation.market_value_amount value_type_property market_value_amount CollateralValuation.market_value_amount uses MonetaryAmount. CollateralValuation.market_value_amount uses MonetaryAmount.
value.CollateralValuation.haircut_rate value_type_property haircut_rate CollateralValuation.haircut_rate uses Rate. CollateralValuation.haircut_rate uses Rate.

metric_field.collateral_valuations.eligible_collateral_value metric_field eligible_collateral_value Market value after haircut for regulatory eligible collateral reporting. Market value after haircut for regulatory eligible collateral reporting.

requirement.EligibleCollateralRequirement regulatory_requirement EligibleCollateralRequirement Regulator requires daily account-level eligible collateral details. Regulator requires daily account-level eligible collateral details.

requirement_item.EligibleCollateralRequirement.MarginAccount.reference_counterparty requirement_semantic_item MarginAccount.reference_counterparty Counterparty ownership is required for supervisory aggregation.
requirement_item.EligibleCollateralRequirement.MarginAccount.pledge_collateral requirement_semantic_item MarginAccount.pledge_collateral Pledged collateral must be linked to the account.
requirement_item.EligibleCollateralRequirement.CollateralValuation.value_collateral requirement_semantic_item CollateralValuation.value_collateral Valuation must identify the collateral being valued.
requirement_item.EligibleCollateralRequirement.account_identifier requirement_semantic_item MarginAccount.account_id Account-level reconciliation key. Account-level reconciliation key.
requirement_item.EligibleCollateralRequirement.counterparty_identifier requirement_semantic_item Counterparty.counterparty_id Counterparty aggregation key. Counterparty aggregation key.
requirement_item.EligibleCollateralRequirement.collateral_identifier requirement_semantic_item CollateralAsset.collateral_id Collateral position key. Collateral position key.
requirement_item.EligibleCollateralRequirement.valuation_date requirement_semantic_item CollateralValuation.valuation_date Reporting valuation date. Reporting valuation date.

requirement_item.EligibleCollateralRequirement.market_value_amount requirement_semantic_item CollateralValuation.market_value_amount Gross market value before haircut. Gross market value before haircut.
requirement_item.EligibleCollateralRequirement.haircut_rate requirement_semantic_item CollateralValuation.haircut_rate Supervisory haircut rate. Supervisory haircut rate.
requirement_item.EligibleCollateralRequirement.eligible_collateral_value requirement_semantic_item eligible_collateral_value
